name: SOCOM Suppressed
description: Arme silencieuse de base pour le prototype Side Ops.

name: Cardboard Box
description: Permet des options d’infiltration et de camouflage.

name: Keycard Lv.1
description: Déverrouille les accès de sécurité basiques.

name: SOCOM Ammo Box
description: Recharge de munitions Side Ops pour maintenir la pression en mission.

name: Hidden Archive Fragment
description: Objet secret lié aux logs Codec, tapes et entrées Lore.

name: Bulkhead Keycard
description: Variante Tanker de la keycard Side Ops, utilisée pour ouvrir le bulkhead access lock.

name: MG1 Handgun
description: Operation Intrude N313 handgun with the historical four-player-projectile display limit.

name: MG1 Landmine
description: Anti-tank mine used against the Outer Heaven Tank, limited to three onscreen.

name: MG1 Plastic Explosive
description: Timed charge used to sabotage the TX-55 legs in Pettrovich's ordered pattern.

name: MG1 Remote-Controlled Missile
description: Remote-controlled missile auto-equipped for the Shotmaker arena; Snake remains immobile while steering it.

name: MG1 Grenade Launcher
description: Grenade launcher used against the Hind D and armored Bulldozer.

name: MG1 Rocket Launcher
description: Heavy launcher required against the Bloody Brad TX-11 pair and Big Boss.

name: Outer Heaven Access Card
description: Access card recovered when Snake establishes contact with the resistance.
